text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After classes, I spot Matikanetannhauser and
Mejiro Palmer on campus trying to recruit other
students for something.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Come one, come all! Try Machitan and Palmer's
Love Consultation Center for all your relationship
needs!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Are you facing your worries alone? Then it's time
to let out all those pent-up emotions! ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey, Trainer! Ehehe, that's right.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
When I was growing up, I heard all about the ins
and outs of life from customers at our restaurant!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: So leave all your romantic troubles to me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: And I thought it sounded fun, so here I am!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Excuse me... Is now a good time?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, welcome! Of course! You can talk to us about
anything. Don't be shy.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Um... The thing is, I'm in a long-distance
relationship...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Long-distance, you say? That's a very
common dilemma.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
When you're apart, I'm sure your mind starts to
run wild with all kinds of worries.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
That's right. It's so lonely not being able to see
each other... I just don't know what to do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I see, I see. It's rough not being able to see the
people you want to, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
What do you think, Tannhauser? Any useful
advice for her?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Certainly! Allow me to recount a personal
anecdote!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
See, sometimes I want to eat my family's grilled
mackerel set so bad I can hardly stand it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Uh... grilled mackerel?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But of course I can't just go back home whenever
I want. So I have to stay strong and hold out until
my next visit!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Then, when I do finally get to eat it, all the
waiting makes it a million times more delicious!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: In other words, if your longing is at 100%, then when you finally eat—I mean—meet, your happiness will jump to over 200%!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Pft... Pffft, ahahaha! Sorry!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh man, ahahaha! You're comparing a
long-distance relationship to grilled mackerel?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh? Did I say something weird?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: No, nothing weird. It was just funny!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Strangely enough, I actually can relate to
your story.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
The more time apart, the more joy I'll feel when
we meet again... Hehe, I get it. Instead of feeling
lonely, I should be thinking about how exciting
it'll be!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha. Seems like it was good advice, after all.
Great job, Tannhauser!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Heh, heh. Leave the relationship advice to me!
choice_data_list: That was a surprisingly tasteful anecdote.
That was a surprisingly tasteful anecdote.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Heh, heh. Leave the relationship advice to me!
choice_data_list: That was a surprisingly tasteful anecdote.
That was a surprisingly tasteful anecdote.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Gah... All this talk of food is making me hungry.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Even if I can't have grilled mackerel, I need to eat
something!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Then let's head to a cafe! Nothing better for
cheering up than a full stomach. ♪

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of them enjoy a meal while diving into
more relationship talk.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. Let's keep this momentum going and
help even more people solve their problems!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You know, your methods might be unusual, but I
think they'll really catch on!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...Oh! Over there! I sense someone with love
troubles!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser spends the day roaming the
academy grounds on the lookout for students
with romantic troubles!
